name: Cyber Fraud Test
story: I received a WhatsApp message from an unknown number offering a work-from-home data entry job. The person claimed to be from a reputable company and asked me to pay a registration fee of ₹5000 via UPI to secure the position. I paid ₹5000 to UPI ID fakejob@upi through PhonePe. After the payment, the person blocked me on WhatsApp and stopped responding. I have screenshots of the WhatsApp conversation, the UPI transaction screenshot showing the payment to fakejob@upi, and the bank SMS confirming the debit of ₹5000. The phone number used was +91-9876543210. This happened on January 15, 2024.
